name: Edgio Edge and Application Delivery Platform API
what_it_does: Edge platform with REST API — enabling teams to deploy Next.js/Nuxt/React applications at the edge, accelerate websites with global CDN, stream video with edge-based media delivery, protect applications with WAF and DDoS mitigation, and manage real-time edge configuration, combining CDN, edge compute, and streaming delivery in one platform.
use_cases: Deploying Next.js or Nuxt applications to Edgio edge network via API and CLI for frontend delivery
Managing CDN cache rules and edge configuration via Edgio REST API for performance optimization
Streaming live and on-demand video via Edgio Media Delivery API for video platform integration
Configuring WAF rules and security policies via Edgio API for application security automation
Querying edge analytics and performance metrics via Edgio API for performance monitoring
not_for: General cloud compute (use AWS, GCP, or Azure for backend infrastructure)
Database hosting (Edgio is edge delivery, not database infrastructure)
Simple static hosting (use Netlify or Vercel for simpler static deployments)
best_when: A Next.js/Nuxt team needs edge-native deployment with CDN, streaming, and WAF integrated — especially for media-heavy sites or e-commerce where edge performance directly impacts conversion.
avoid_when: You're using non-JavaScript frameworks primarily, have simple static hosting needs, or prefer Vercel/Netlify for JAMstack deployment.

auth.notes: API token from Edgio account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with team-level access. Webhook for deployment and edge events. REST API for environment and configuration management. CLI (@edgio/cli) for deployment. JavaScript SDK for edge functions. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Scoped by organization and team. Media delivery configuration via separate media management API.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro from $100/month; Business custom; Enterprise custom (media delivery separate pricing)
pricing.notes: Scottsdale, Arizona company. Founded 2016 as Moovweb. Rebranded to Edgio 2022 after merger with Limelight Networks. NASDAQ listed (EGIO). Limelight was a Tier 1 CDN with direct interconnects and media delivery. Edgio combines Limelight's CDN/media with Moovweb's edge compute for Next.js/React. 25+ PoPs globally. Strong in media/entertainment and retail. Customers include Tumi, Forever 21, Shoe Carnival. Media streaming via Uplynk (video platform product). Financial stress — evaluate viability given NASDAQ listing performance.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for deployment and edge configuration. API token + OAuth2 auth. Good documentation for Next.js/Nuxt integration. Webhook for deployment events. CLI for deployment automation. Media delivery API is separate from CDN configuration API. NASDAQ-listed company — evaluate financial stability for long-term integration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Environment reads fully idempotent. Deployment reads idempotent by deployment ID. Cache configuration reads idempotent. Deployment creation requires idempotency key for deduplication.
known_agent_gotchas: NASDAQ-listed with financial challenges — evaluate vendor stability before long-term commitment
Media delivery (Uplynk) and CDN/compute (Layer0) are different product lines with separate APIs
Edge functions are JavaScript-only — no other runtimes at edge
Next.js/React focus — less optimal for non-JavaScript frameworks
Merger integration (Moovweb + Limelight) may result in documentation gaps between product lines

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, PCI-DSS compliant. Multi-region data residency. API token + OAuth2 auth. NASDAQ-listed with public company security standards. WAF and DDoS protection built-in. PCI-DSS for payment page delivery. Media content may include sensitive streaming content — DRM and geo-restriction via API. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Edge function code security is operator responsibility.
